category_sources: source_facts.description says SEC is an event correlation tool; official README says it is for event log monitoring, network/security management, fraud detection, and other event correlation tasks.
display_name_sources: official README identifies the project as SEC (Simple Event Correlator).
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project site; official repository README provides introduction, installation, and file documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: official README describes event processing, log monitoring, daemon use, and shell pipeline use.
